debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
A : Set U
B : Set V
a : U
b : V
f : U → V
h1 : one_one_on f A
h2 : image f A = B
h3 : a ∈ A
h4 : f a = b
⊢ ↑(A \ {a}) ∼ ↑(B \ {b})

proof:
by
  let g : ↑(A \ {a}) → ↑(B \ {b}) := fun ⟨x, hx⟩ =>
    ⟨f x, ⟨by rw [← h2]; exact ⟨x, hx.1, rfl⟩,
          fun hfx => hx.2 (by rw [← h4] at hfx; exact h1 hx.1 h3 hfx)⟩⟩
  exists g
  constructor
  · intro ⟨x1, hx1⟩ ⟨x2, hx2⟩ hg
    apply Subtype.eq
    injection hg with hf
    exact h1 hx1.1 hx2.1 hf
  · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
    rcases (h2.symm ▸ hy.1 : y ∈ image f A) with ⟨x, hxA, hfxy⟩
    exists ⟨x, ⟨hxA, fun hxa => hy.2 (by rw [← hfxy, hxa, h4]; rfl)⟩⟩
    apply Subtype.eq
    exact hfxy
successful_attempts:
by
  let g : ↑(A \ {a}) → ↑(B \ {b}) := fun ⟨x, hx⟩ =>
    ⟨f x, ⟨by rw [← h2]; exact ⟨x, hx.1, rfl⟩,
          fun hfx => hx.2 (by rw [← h4] at hfx; exact h1 hx.1 h3 hfx)⟩⟩
  exists g
  constructor
  · intro ⟨x1, hx1⟩ ⟨x2, hx2⟩ hg
    apply Subtype.eq
    injection hg with hf
    exact h1 hx1.1 hx2.1 hf
  · intro ⟨y, hy⟩
    rcases (h2.symm ▸ hy.1 : y ∈ image f A) with ⟨x, hxA, hfxy⟩
    exists ⟨x, ⟨hxA, fun hxa => hy.2 (by rw [← hfxy, hxa, h4]; rfl)⟩⟩
    apply Subtype.eq
    exact hfxy
